title: Tetovo, Polog — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tetovo, Polog: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tetovo is a city in Polog with a population of 63,000. A city in northwestern North Macedonia at the foot of Šar Mountain, known for the colorful Šarena Mosque, Tetovo Fortress, and its Albanian cultural heritage.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
